label: 220108 Restrictions

children.text: the purposes stated in ; orsection 220102 of this title
raising funds to accomplish those purposes.

children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: b .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The corporation may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: c .—Political Activities
children.text: The corporation shall be nonpolitical and may not provide financial aid or assistance to, or otherwise promote the candidacy of, an individual seeking elective public office. A substantial part of the activities of the corporation may not involve carrying on propaganda or otherwise attempting to influence legislation.

children.heading: .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.label: d .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.text: The income or assets of the corporation may not inure to the benefit of a governor, officer, member, or employee or be distributed to any person during the life of the corporation or on its dissolution or final liquidation. This subsection does not prevent the payment of reasonable compensation to an officer, employee, or other person or reimbursement for actual necessary expenses in amounts approved by the board of governors.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: e .—Loans
children.text: The corporation may not make a loan to a governor, officer, member, or employee.
